name: Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder. Cut in the butter using two knives or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Gradually add the buttermilk, stirring with a fork until a soft dough forms. Knead lightly on a floured surface.
3. Turn out the dough onto a lightly floured board. Roll to a thickness of 1/2 inch. Cut into rounds and place on an ungreased baking sheet, not touching each other for crisper biscuits or close together for softer biscuits. If desired, brush with melted butter.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until firm and lightly browned.
